summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PCOS wellness tracker PWA. Frontend design and most user flows working excellently with beautiful Pinterest aesthetic. Found critical backend date formatting bugs and frontend checkbox interaction issues.

critical_bugs.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
ValueError: Unknown format code 'd' for object of type 'str' - month parameter is string but code expects int

server_issues.issue: Public URL returning 520 errors for some endpoints
server_issues.workaround: Basic endpoints working, complex ones failing

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay elements intercepting pointer events - checkboxes not clickable

integration_issues.issue: Predictions section not showing due to backend API failures

passed_tests: Dashboard loading with boyfriend messages and stats
Craving emergency with healthy alternatives (Kurkure → Roasted chana)
Period tracker calendar view and form submission
Admin panel (Boyfriend Panel) for message management
PWA manifest and service worker setup
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix checkbox overlay issues in Daily Habits page preventing user interaction. HIGH: Fix backend datetime handling bugs in period prediction and monthly report generation endpoints.
